title: ⚙️ System Configuration
description: Configure uDOS system settings, display options, and advanced features

fields.name: display_mode
fields.label: 🖥️ Display Mode
fields.help: Select display resolution: micro (80×45) to ultra (640×480)

fields.name: border_style
fields.label: 🎨 ASCII Border Style
fields.help: Choose ASCII border style for interface blocks

fields.name: color_scheme
fields.label: 🌈 Color Scheme
fields.help: Select color scheme for terminal interface

fields.name: logging_level
fields.label: 📝 Logging Level
fields.help: Set the verbosity level for system logging

fields.name: enable_debug_mode
fields.label: 🔧 Enable Debug Mode
fields.help: Enable detailed debugging and diagnostic information

fields.name: verbose_output
fields.label: 💬 Verbose Output
fields.help: Show detailed command execution information

fields.name: auto_backup_interval
fields.label: 💾 Auto Backup Interval
fields.help: Frequency of automatic system backups

fields.name: backup_retention
fields.label: 🗂️ Backup Retention
fields.help: How long to keep backup files

fields.name: session_timeout
fields.label: ⏰ Session Timeout
fields.help: Automatic session timeout for security

fields.name: command_history_size
fields.label: 📚 Command History Size
fields.help: Maximum number of commands to keep in history

fields.name: enable_shortcuts
fields.label: ⌨️ Enable Keyboard Shortcuts
fields.help: Enable advanced keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys

fields.name: shortcode_suggestions
fields.label: 💡 Enable Shortcode Suggestions
fields.help: Show intelligent shortcode suggestions while typing

fields.name: predictive_input
fields.label: 🔮 Enable Predictive Input
fields.help: Enable predictive input system with auto-completion

fields.name: dashboard_auto_refresh
fields.label: 🔄 Dashboard Auto-Refresh
fields.help: Automatic refresh interval for live dashboards

fields.name: error_reporting
fields.label: 🚨 Error Reporting Level
fields.help: Level of detail in error reporting and diagnostics

fields.name: performance_monitoring
fields.label: 📊 Performance Monitoring
fields.help: Enable system performance monitoring and metrics collection

fields.name: memory_limit
fields.label: 💾 Memory Usage Limit
fields.help: Maximum memory usage for uDOS operations

fields.name: network_timeout
fields.label: 🌐 Network Timeout
fields.help: Network request timeout in seconds (5-300)

fields.name: experimental_features
fields.label: 🧪 Enable Experimental Features
fields.help: Access cutting-edge features still in development

fields.name: telemetry_enabled
fields.label: 📡 Enable Anonymous Telemetry
fields.help: Send anonymous usage statistics to help improve uDOS
